description: Style NoteSport this orange cap designed by adidas with climalite technology. Stay cool while it heats up, with the old school Adidas tri stripes, beat the scorching sun and at the same time make a style statement that is defined by this brilliant cap!Product DetailsOrange cap with embroidered eyelets on the crown, 'Adidas' text appliquéd on the front and Adidas patented 3-Stripes appliquéd on the visor an adjustable buckle back strapMaterial and Care100% polyesterHand wash cold waterDo not dry cleanLine dry
